nodes.text: Good afternoon. I've been meaning to switch to a local pharmacy for some time now. I usually go to the chain across town, but a neighbor mentioned this one. I'd like to fill a prescription.

responses.text: Welcome. What medication are we filling?
Happy to help. I'll need to see the prescription and your ID.

nodes.text: Hydrocodone. For my knee. I had surgery several years ago and the pain has been chronic since. Dr. Manders manages it.

responses.text: Can you tell me Dr. Manders' specialty?
I'll need to look up the prescriber. Can I see your ID?

nodes.text: He's been my doctor for the knee for a long time.

responses.text: What type of practice is he in?
The prescription will have his NPI. Let me look it up.

nodes.text: I'd need to check. He handles several things for me.

responses.text: I'll verify through the database. ID, please.
Thank you. One moment while I verify.

nodes.text: Take your time. I'm in no hurry.
